items.title: 8-K — Termination of Material Agreement · Acquisition or Disposition · Listing / Delisting / Compliance · Modifications to Holder Rights · Changes in Control · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge shareholders approve merger with Portman Ridge Finance
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance obtained shareholder approval for its merger with Portman Ridge Finance Corporation on June 20, 2025.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge adviser funds $0.47 per share to ensure 100% NAV recovery in merger
items.snippet: Logan Ridge's adviser agreed to fund an incremental $0.47/share cash payment to shareholders immediately before its merger closes with Portman Ridge Finance.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: ISS and Glass Lewis recommend Logan Ridge shareholders vote FOR Portman Ridge merger
items.snippet: Proxy advisory firms ISS and Glass Lewis both recommended LRFC stockholders approve the proposed merger with Portman Ridge Finance Corporation.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q1 2025 NII of $0.35/share, NAV $29.66, declares $0.36 distribution
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q1 2025 NII of $0.35/share and NAV of $29.66/share, declared a $0.36 Q2 distribution, and exited its GA Communications equity position.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q4 2024 NII of $0.56, NAV $32.04, announces Portman Ridge merger
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q4 2024 NII of $0.56/share and NAV of $32.04/share, and announced a merger agreement with Portman Ridge Finance.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q3 2024 NII of $0.37, raises Q4 distribution 9%
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q3 2024 NII of $0.37/share and NAV of $32.31/share, exited its Nth Degree equity investment, and raised its Q4 distribution 9% to $0.36/share.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge exits largest equity investment, Nth Degree Investment Group, at fair value
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance exited its largest equity holding, Nth Degree Investment Group, LLC, at or above its June 30, 2024 fair value.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge amends KeyBank credit facility, cuts rate margin to 2.80%, extends to 2029
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance amended its senior secured revolving credit facility with KeyBank, reducing the interest rate margin to 2.80% and extending maturity to August 2029.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q2 2024 NII of $0.28/share, NAV $33.13, declares $0.33 distribution
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q2 2024 NII of $0.28/share and total investment income of $5.4 million, with NAV of $33.13/share, and declared a $0.33 Q3 distribution.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Non-Reliance on Prior Financials
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q1 2024 NII of $0.35/share, NAV rises to $33.71, raises distribution
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q1 2024 NII of $0.35/share, with NAV increasing to $33.71/share, and raised its Q2 distribution 3% — the fifth consecutive quarterly increase.

items.title: 8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q3 2023 NII of $0.43/share, raises Q4 distribution 15% to $0.30
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q3 2023 NII of $0.43/share, a 13% increase from the prior quarter, and raised its Q4 distribution 15% to $0.30/share.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q2 2023 NII of $0.38, raises Q3 distribution 18%
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q2 2023 NII of $0.38/share with NAV rising 3.0% to $35.68/share, and raised its Q3 distribution 18% to $0.26/share.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q1 2023 NII of $0.40/share, up 69%, raises Q2 distribution 22%
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q1 2023 NII of $0.40/share, a 69% increase from the prior quarter, and raised its Q2 distribution 22% to $0.22/share.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge launches $5M Rule 10b5-1 open-market share repurchase plan effective March 2023
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance entered into a new Rule 10b5-1 stock trading plan to facilitate open-market repurchases under its recently authorized share repurchase program.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q4 2022 NII of $0.23/share, restores quarterly distribution at $0.18
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q4 2022 NII of $0.23/share, restored its quarterly distribution at $0.18/share for Q1 2023, and authorized a $5 million share repurchase program.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q3 2022 NII of $0.07/share, first positive NII as a milestone
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance reported its first meaningful positive NII of $0.07/share in Q3 2022 while continuing to exit legacy equity portfolio positions.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q2 2022 results, lowers cost of capital, reduces equity exposure
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance reported Q2 2022 results, highlighting lower cost of capital and reduced non-interest-earning equity exposure as it executes its turnaround strategy.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Results of Operations · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge reports Q1 2022 results, NAV $39.16/share, as legacy refinancing completes
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance posted Q1 2022 results with NAV of $39.16/share as it refinanced its legacy capital structure and redeployed proceeds into interest-earning assets.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge refinances entire legacy capital structure, raises KeyBank facility to $75M
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance completed a full legacy capital structure refinancing, increasing its KeyBank revolving credit facility from $25 million to $75 million.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Unregistered Sale of Equity · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment
8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge receives Egan-Jones BBB- rating, prices $50M notes at 5.25% due 2026
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance received a BBB- investment grade rating from Egan-Jones and priced a private placement of $50 million in 5.25% senior unsecured notes due 2026.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Logan Ridge commits $51.9M to six new portfolio companies, exits five legacy investments
items.snippet: Logan Ridge Finance committed $51.9 million to six new portfolio companies and successfully exited five legacy holdings for proceeds of $59.7 million.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote

8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Termination of Material Agreement · Auditor Changes · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Amendments to Charter / Bylaws · Shareholder Director Nominations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance completes adviser transition, renames itself Logan Ridge Finance Corporation
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. completed its transition to new investment adviser Mount Logan Management LLC and changed its name to Logan Ridge Finance Corporation.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance reports Q1 2021, NAV rises 11.3% to $44.74/share, cuts debt-to-equity to 1.62x
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q1 2021 results with NAV per share rising 11.3% to $44.74 and total debt-to-equity declining to 1.62x after repaying $20 million of SBA debentures.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance board selects BC Partners affiliate Mount Logan as new investment adviser
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp.'s board selected Mount Logan Management LLC, an affiliate of BC Partners, as its new investment adviser, replacing Capitala Investment Advisors.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance reports Q4 2020, NAV $40.19/share, closes $25M KeyBank credit facility
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q4 2020 results with NAV of $40.19/share and closed a new $25 million senior secured credit facility with KeyBank.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Results of Operations · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance reports Q3 2020, NAV rises 3% to $39.99/share, cuts leverage to 1.99x
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q3 2020 results with NAV rising 3% to $39.99/share after repaying $59 million of SBA debentures, reducing total debt-to-equity to 1.99x.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Amendments to Charter / Bylaws · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance reports Q2 2020, NAV rises to $6.46/share, winds down senior loan fund
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q2 2020 results with NAV rising to $6.46/share, successfully winding down its senior loan fund joint venture and reducing non-accruals.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance receives $51.1M in portfolio repayments in Q2 2020, plans to cut leverage
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. received over $51.1 million in Q2 2020 repayments, including $17.8 million from Flavors Holdings, and plans to use proceeds to reduce leverage.

items.title: 8-K — Termination of Material Agreement
8-K — Results of Operations · Submission of Matters to a Vote · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance reports Q1 2020 results, suspends distributions for Q2 amid COVID-19
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q1 2020 results and announced the suspension of regular distributions for Q2 2020 due to COVID-19 economic disruptions.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance shifts distributions to quarterly from monthly amid COVID-19
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. announced distributions will move from monthly to quarterly frequency effective Q2 2020 in response to the COVID-19 environment.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance posts Q4 2019 results, invests $29M, takes $25.9M gain exiting Nth Degree
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. posted Q4 2019 results with $29 million deployed in the quarter and a $25.9 million realized gain from a partial exit of its Nth Degree investment.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Capitala Finance declares Q1 2020 monthly distributions of $0.0833/share per month
items.snippet: Capitala Finance Corp. declared normal monthly distributions for Q1 2020 of $0.0833/share per month, totaling $0.25/share for the quarter.
